title: T-013 — Export engine (PDF Edge Function + CSV stream + report_exports writer) (12-REPORTING §8.4, §11 V-RPT-EXPORT-*)
prompt:
# T-013 — Export engine (PDF + CSV)

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §8.4 (Export flow), §11 V-RPT-EXPORT-1..7, §14.1 (BRCGS 7-year retention)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the P1 export pipeline: Server Action `exportDashboard(dashboardId, filters, format)` → write report_exports row status='generating' → enqueue job to apps/worker (long-running) → worker generates PDF via Puppeteer edge function OR CSV via UTF-8 BOM stream → compute SHA-256 → upload to Vercel Blob → update report_exports row status='completed' + file_size_bytes + sha256_hash → return presigned URL with 60s expiry. Enforces all V-RPT-EXPORT-* validations.

## Implementation contract
1. Server Action `packages/reporting/src/actions/export-dashboard.ts`:
   - Permission gate: `rpt.export.csv` or `rpt.export.pdf` (T-001).
   - Zod schema validates dashboardId + filters + format (V-RPT-EXPORT-5: format ∈ {pdf, csv} P1; xlsx/json P2 returns 400 with `feature_disabled`).
   - Row count pre-check: query corresponding MV with filters; if > 10k rows, P1 returns `{error: 'too_many_rows', suggestion: 'narrow_filters_or_chunk'}` (V-RPT-EXPORT-1).
   - Duplicate detection: if same (user, dashboard, filters_hash) submitted within last 10s, return 429 (V-RPT-EXPORT-6).
   - INSERT report_exports row status='generating', sha256_hash='pending', file_size_bytes=0.
   - Enqueue worker job with export_id; return job_id to client for polling.
2. Worker job `apps/worker/src/jobs/reporting-export.ts`:
   - For format='pdf': call Supabase Edge Function `reporting-export-pdf` (Puppeteer, @media print stylesheet per BACKLOG BL-RPT-04); 30s timeout per V-RPT-EXPORT-7 → on timeout, UPDATE row status='failed', error_code='PDF_TIMEOUT'.
   - For format='csv': stream rows from MV with UTF-8 BOM; chunk in memory; never load full result.
   - On success: compute SHA-256 of payload, upload to Vercel Blob, UPDATE row status='completed' + file_size_bytes + sha256_hash.
   - File size > 100MB → fail with error_code='FILE_TOO_LARGE' (V-RPT-EXPORT-4).
3. Server Action `packages/reporting/src/actions/get-export-status.ts` polls report_exports for a given export_id; returns presigned URL when status='completed'.
4. Edge Function `supabase/functions/reporting-export-pdf/index.ts` Puppeteer wrapper with @media print CSS injection.
5. Vitest contract test: (a) row-count cap V-RPT-EXPORT-1, (b) dedup window V-RPT-EXPORT-6, (c) PDF timeout V-RPT-EXPORT-7 transitions row to failed + error_code, (d) sha256 NOT NULL after success V-RPT-EXPORT-2, (e) retention_until = now + 7y V-RPT-EXPORT-3 (already enforced by T-004 GENERATED column; re-verify here), (f) cross-org isolation — user A cannot fetch user B's export presigned URL.

## Files
- packages/reporting/src/actions/export-dashboard.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/get-export-status.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/jobs/reporting-export.ts [create]
- supabase/functions/reporting-export-pdf/index.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/export-engine.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a Server Action call with filters that match 12k rows, when exportDashboard runs, then returns `{error:'too_many_rows'}` and writes NO report_exports row (V-RPT-EXPORT-1).
2. Given the same (user, dashboard, filters_hash) is submitted twice within 10s, when the 2nd call runs, then returns 429 with `Retry-After` header (V-RPT-EXPORT-6).
3. Given PDF generation takes > 30s, when Edge Function timeouts, then report_exports row transitions to status='failed' + error_message contains 'PDF_TIMEOUT' (V-RPT-EXPORT-7) + suggests CSV alternative.
4. Given CSV export completes with 5k rows and 2MB payload, when status is queried, then sha256_hash is the SHA-256 of the actual streamed payload (verified by re-hashing the downloaded file in test) — never null (V-RPT-EXPORT-2).
5. Given an export row for user A exists, when user B calls get-export-status with that export_id, then returns 403 not the presigned URL (cross-org+cross-user isolation).
6. Given export row exported_at='2026-05-14', when retention_until is read, then it equals 2033-05-14 (T-004's GENERATED column, V-RPT-EXPORT-3 re-verified at this layer).

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/reporting/__tests__/export-engine.test.ts` covers 6 ACs; mocks Edge Function with controllable delay for timeout case.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test export-engine`.
- GREEN: write Server Actions + worker job + Edge Function.

## Risk red lines
- Do not generate exports in a Server Action — Server Action enqueues only; worker generates (30s+ jobs forbidden in request path).
- Do not skip sha256 — V-RPT-EXPORT-2 mandates NOT NULL; reject any write attempting `sha256_hash IS NULL` (DB constraint already enforces).
- Do not allow xlsx/json formats in P1 — V-RPT-EXPORT-5 rejects until P2.
- Do not store raw user input in export error_message — sanitise to enum codes (PDF_TIMEOUT, FILE_TOO_LARGE, ROW_LIMIT).
- Do not return the presigned URL to a different user — strict (org_id, user_id) check in get-export-status.
- Do not skip @media print CSS for Puppeteer; BACKLOG BL-RPT-04 must be resolved as part of this task (declared in PRD §15).
- Do not allow file_size > 100MB (V-RPT-EXPORT-4).

pipeline_inputs.description: P1 export engine: PDF (Puppeteer Edge Function) + CSV (UTF-8 BOM stream) + report_exports writer + SHA-256 + V-RPT-EXPORT-1..7 enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action enqueues, worker generates, Edge Function renders PDF. SHA-256 computed server-side. Row-count cap, dedup window, timeout fallback. xlsx/json deferred P2.
out_of_scope: Do not implement xlsx / json formats (P2)
Do not implement scheduled email delivery (P2 T-024+)
Do not implement export_history UI here (T-016 sibling — RPT-EXPORTS)
Do not implement regulatory_signoff e-sig path (P2 RPT-012)
acceptance_criteria: Given export row exported_at='2026-05-14', when retention_until is read, then it equals 2033-05-14 (T-004 GENERATED column re-verified)
Given the same (user, dashboard, filters_hash) is submitted twice within 10s, when the 2nd call runs, then returns 429 with Retry-After header (V-RPT-EXPORT-6)
Given a Server Action call with filters matching 12k rows, when exportDashboard runs, then returns {error:'too_many_rows'} and writes NO report_exports row (V-RPT-EXPORT-1)

Given edge and compliance cases are exercised, when each condition is triggered, then report_exports row transitions to status='failed' + error_message contains 'PDF_TIMEOUT' + suggests CSV alternative and sha256_hash equals SHA-256 of the actual streamed payload.
test_strategy: RED: packages/reporting/__tests__/export-engine.test.ts covers 6 ACs; mocks Edge Function with controllable delay for timeout case
GREEN: write Server Actions + worker job + Edge Function
risk_red_lines: Do not generate exports in a Server Action — worker only (30s+ jobs forbidden in request path)
Do not skip SHA-256 — V-RPT-EXPORT-2 mandates NOT NULL
Do not allow xlsx/json in P1 — V-RPT-EXPORT-5
Do not store raw user input in error_message — sanitise to enum codes
Do not return presigned URL to a different user — strict (org, user) check
Do not skip @media print CSS for Puppeteer (BL-RPT-04)

No raw PII in reports/exports — PII columns (email, phone, address, surname, dob, national_id) must be redacted, hashed, or omitted at the read-model boundary. Consult Foundation T-117 pino redact allowlist for the canonical PII column set.
